info.title: FlaUI.Cli
info.description: AI-agent-friendly CLI for Windows UI Automation. Drive applications, find elements with quality-rated selectors, and record interactions — all via JSON output.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: FlaUI CLI — automate Windows desktop apps from the terminal

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Versionsinformationen anzeigen

options.name: --session
options.description: Path to session JSON file. Auto-detected from the working directory if not specified

commands.name: session
commands.description: Manage sessions

commands.name: new
commands.description: Launch an application and create a new session

options.name: --app
options.description: Full or relative path to the .exe to launch (e.g. "C:\Apps\MyApp.exe")

options.name: --args
options.description: Command-line arguments forwarded to the application (e.g. "--config prod.json")

options.name: --wait-title
options.description: Wait until a window title contains this text before completing session creation

options.name: --wait-timeout
options.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for --wait-title (default: 30000) [default: 30000]

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the main window (default: 30000) [default: 30000]

commands.name: attach
commands.description: Attach to a running application and create a session

options.name: --pid
options.description: OS process ID to attach to (e.g. 12345). Use one of --pid, --name, or --title

options.name: --name
options.description: Process name without .exe (e.g. "notepad"). Attaches to the first match

options.name: --title
options.description: Main window title text to match (e.g. "Untitled - Notepad")

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the main window (default: 10000) [default: 10000]

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show session status

commands.name: end
commands.description: End the session

options.name: --close-app
options.description: Also close the target application process when ending the session [default: False]

options.name: --force
options.description: Force-kill the application process (use with --close-app for unresponsive apps) [default: False]

commands.name: elem
commands.description: Find and interact with elements

commands.name: find
commands.description: Find an element by properties

options.name: --aid
options.description: AutomationId property to match (e.g. "SubmitButton"). Preferred — gives 'stable' selector quality

options.name: --name
options.description: Element Name property to match (e.g. "Submit"). Gives 'acceptable' selector quality

options.name: --type
options.description: UIA ControlType to match (e.g. "Button", "Edit", "ComboBox")

options.name: --class
options.description: WPF/WinForms ClassName to match (e.g. "TextBox"). Gives 'fragile' selector quality

options.name: --timeout
options.description: How long to search before giving up, in milliseconds [default: 10000]

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: tree
commands.description: Dump the element tree as JSON

options.name: --root
options.description: Element ID to use as tree root. Omit to start from the main window

options.name: --depth
options.description: Maximum levels to descend into the element hierarchy [default: 3]

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: props
commands.description: Get element properties

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find'. Returns all UIA properties including bounds, enabled, and offscreen state

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: click
commands.description: Click an element

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find' (e.g. "ec86bb98")

options.name: --double
options.description: Perform a double-click instead of a single click [default: False]

options.name: --right
options.description: Perform a right-click (context menu) instead of a left click [default: False]

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: type
commands.description: Type text into an element

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find' (e.g. "f9d13611")

options.name: --text
options.description: Text string to type into the element via keyboard simulation

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: set-value
commands.description: Set an element's value via the Value pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find'

options.name: --value
options.description: Value to set directly via the UIA Value pattern (faster than 'type', but not all controls support it)

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: select
commands.description: Select an item in a combo box or list

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID of a ComboBox or ListBox returned by 'elem find'

options.name: --item
options.description: Display text of the item to select (e.g. "Finland")

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-value
commands.description: Get an element's value

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find'

options.name: --save
options.description: Store the retrieved value in the session file under this variable name for later use

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-state
commands.description: Get an element's state

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find'. Returns toggle state, enabled/disabled, and visibility

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: keys
commands.description: Send keyboard input (key combinations or single keys)

options.name: --keys
options.description: Key combination to send (e.g. "ctrl+shift+s", "tab", "alt+f4")

options.name: --id
options.description: Optional element ID to focus before sending keys

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: menu
commands.description: Navigate and click a menu item by path

options.name: --path
options.description: Menu path with '>' separators (e.g. "File > Save As")

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clear the text content of an element

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find' (e.g. "f9d13611")

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: scroll-into-view
commands.description: Scroll an element into view using the ScrollItem pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID to scroll into view

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: expand
commands.description: Expand an element (Expander, TreeViewItem, ComboBox, etc.)

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find' (e.g. "ec86bb98")

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: collapse
commands.description: Collapse an element (Expander, TreeViewItem, ComboBox, etc.)

options.name: --id
options.description: Short element ID returned by 'elem find' (e.g. "ec86bb98")

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-range
commands.description: Get an element's range value, minimum, maximum, and step sizes via the RangeValue pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: set-range
commands.description: Set an element's value via the RangeValue pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --value
options.description: Value to set

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: grid-info
commands.description: Get row count, column count, and column headers from a Grid/Table element

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-cell
commands.description: Get the value of a cell in a Grid element by row and column index

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --row
options.description: Row index (0-based)

options.name: --column
options.description: Column index (0-based)

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-text
commands.description: Get the full text content of an element via the Text pattern (RichTextBox, Document)

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-scroll
commands.description: Get scroll position and state via the Scroll pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: scroll
commands.description: Scroll a container to a position via the Scroll pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --horizontal
options.description: Horizontal scroll percent (0-100, or -1 for no change)

options.name: --vertical
options.description: Vertical scroll percent (0-100, or -1 for no change)

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-dock
commands.description: Get an element's dock position via the Dock pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: set-dock
commands.description: Set an element's dock position via the Dock pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --position
options.description: Dock position: top, bottom, left, right, fill, none

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: grid-item-info
commands.description: Get row, column, and span info for a cell via the GridItem pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: table-item-info
commands.description: Get row and column header info for a cell via the TableItem pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: get-views
commands.description: Get supported views and current view via the MultipleView pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: set-view
commands.description: Set the current view via the MultipleView pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --view
options.description: View ID to set (from get-views)

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: transform
commands.description: Move, resize, or rotate an element via the Transform pattern

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID

options.name: --x
options.description: X coordinate to move to

options.name: --y
options.description: Y coordinate to move to

options.name: --width
options.description: Width to resize to

options.name: --height
options.description: Height to resize to

options.name: --rotate
options.description: Degrees to rotate

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex string from 'window list') to target instead of the main window

commands.name: window
commands.description: Manage application windows

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all top-level windows for the attached application

commands.name: focus
commands.description: Bring a window to the foreground

options.name: --handle
options.description: Window handle as hex string (from 'window list')

commands.name: close
commands.description: Close a window by handle or title

options.name: --handle
options.description: Window handle as hex string (from 'window list')

options.name: --title
options.description: Window title to match (partial, case-insensitive)

options.name: --force
options.description: Force-kill the window's owning process if graceful close fails [default: False]

commands.name: get-state
commands.description: Get window state (visual state, modal, topmost) via the Window pattern

options.name: --handle
options.description: Window handle as hex string (from 'window list')

commands.name: minimize
commands.description: Minimize a window via the Window pattern

options.name: --handle
options.description: Window handle as hex string (from 'window list')

commands.name: maximize
commands.description: Maximize a window via the Window pattern

options.name: --handle
options.description: Window handle as hex string (from 'window list')

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Wait for an element condition or window title

options.name: --aid
options.description: AutomationId of the element to wait for (e.g. "StatusLabel")

options.name: --title
options.description: Wait until a window title contains this text (case-insensitive)

options.name: --value
options.description: Wait until the element's value equals this text (case-insensitive comparison)

options.name: --state
options.description: Wait for a UI state: 'visible' (on-screen), 'hidden' (off-screen or gone), or 'enabled' (interactable)

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Maximum time to wait in milliseconds. Fails with exit code 1 if exceeded

commands.name: record
commands.description: Record and manage interaction steps

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start recording interactions

options.name: --description
options.description: Human-readable label for this recording session (e.g. "Login flow test")

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop recording interactions

commands.name: drop
commands.description: Exclude a recording step

options.name: --seq
options.description: Sequence number of a specific step to exclude (shown in 'record list' output)

options.name: --last
options.description: Exclude the last N recorded steps. Use instead of --seq to quickly undo recent actions [default: 1]

commands.name: keep
commands.description: Re-include a previously dropped recording step

options.name: --seq
options.description: Sequence number of a previously dropped step to restore (reverses a 'record drop')

commands.name: list
commands.description: List recording steps

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export recording steps to JSON

options.name: --out
options.description: File path to write the exported JSON recording (e.g. "recording.json")

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Audit selector quality and missing AutomationIds

options.name: --window
options.description: Element ID of a specific window to audit. Omit to audit the main window

options.name: --recording
options.description: Audit recorded interaction steps instead of scanning live UI elements [default: False]

options.name: --out
options.description: Write the audit JSON report to this file path in addition to stdout

commands.name: batch
commands.description: Execute multiple commands in a single session

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to a JSON file containing batch steps

options.name: --steps
options.description: Inline JSON string with batch steps (e.g. '{"steps": [...]}')

options.name: --continue-on-error
options.description: Continue executing remaining steps after a failure [default: False]

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Capture a screenshot of a window or element

options.name: --id
options.description: Element ID returned by 'elem find' — captures that element's bounding rectangle

options.name: --window
options.description: Window handle (hex) — captures that window instead of the main window

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (required). Format inferred from extension (.png, .bmp, .jpg)

commands.name: report
commands.description: Report an issue to the FlaUI.Cli GitHub repository

options.name: --title
options.description: Issue title

options.name: --description
options.description: Issue body / description
